texto: After the Resurrection, there will be a Day of Judgment. While all will eventually be saved and inherit a kingdom of glory, those who trust in God and seek to follow His laws and ordinances will inherit lives in the eternities that are unimaginable in glory and overwhelming in majesty. That Day of Judgment will be a day of mercy and love—a day when broken hearts are healed, when tears of grief are replaced with tears of gratitude, when all will be made right.
autor: Dieter F. Utchtdorf“O How Great the Plan of Our God
explicacao: Citação de Dieter F. Utchtdorf“O How Great the Plan of Our God sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “After the Resurrection, there will be a Day of Judgment. While all will eventually be saved and i…” articula amor, judgement, mercy em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como luto e mercy.
